Name: Azure Blob Storage Upload
Description: Upload files in a directory to a specified Azure Storage blob container.

Parameters.Name: CopyDirectory
Parameters.Label: Copy Directory
Parameters.HelpText:
Replicates files and directory under the Copy Directory.
Eg. `Content/CDN` that is located at the root of the nuget package.

Parameters.Name: PublishSettingsFile
Parameters.Label: Publish Settings File
Parameters.HelpText:
Absolute path on the tentacle to the Azure publishsettings file to use.
Eg. `C:\Azure\Azure.publishsettings`

Parameters.Name: StorageAccount
Parameters.Label: Storage Account
Parameters.HelpText: The Azure Storage Account to use.

Parameters.Name: StorageAccountKey
Parameters.Label: Storage Account Key
Parameters.HelpText: The primary or secondary key for the Azure Storage Account.

Parameters.Name: NugetPackageStepName
Parameters.Label: Nuget Package Step Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the previously-deployed package step that contains the Copy Directory.
